reference: Hi, I have had a rash between my thighs for the past month. When I scratch it, it gets worse and burns. The area is red and has small bumps on it. I do not know what this is. I also noticed that there is an odor coming from the rash as well. Please help me solve this issue. Can a normal antifungal cream help, or do I need to use a specific cream?
text: Hi, I have had a rash on my thighs the past month, and I scratch it, but it worsens and burns. The area is red and has small bumps on it. I do not know what this is. I also notice that there is an odor coming from the rash as well. Please help me solve this issue. Can a normal antifungal cream help, or do I need to use a specific cream?
